title: ischaemum crinitum
intro: Ischaemum crinitum, also known as the Japanese Millet or Japanese Grass, is a type of grass native to Japan and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Ischaemum crinitum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting healthy digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Ischaemum crinitum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being dried and used as a natural fiber supplement.
